title: Mirrored Columns in Formulas
excerpt: I have a board with 3 mirrored columns. I need to be able to SUM these columns in a formula. I can do that if they are filled with some numbers, but I get an error if one is blank? Suggestions?

posts.author: wyrobot (peter)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a board with 3 mirrored columns. I need to be able to SUM these columns in a formula. I can do that if they are filled with some numbers, but I get an error if one is blank? Suggestions?

posts.author: agranville (Andre Granville)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Wyrobot. I have created an example and I was able to sum up 3 mirrored columns with some columns without values. I have used the sum function available in the formula column. Strange the error you are getting. This operation should be straightforward.

Below the board I have configured:

posts.author: wyrobot (peter)
posts.cookedHtml: Let me try this again. That’s exactly what I’m trying to do, but if a field is blank, there’s an error.

posts.author: wyrobot (peter)
posts.cookedHtml:
